description: Pawan Kalyan's 'Ustaad Bhagat Singh' is creating massive buzz ahead of its March 19th release. Early reviews hail it as 'Paisa Vasool,' with advance bookings already crossing Rs 120 crore. Andhra Pradesh has approved a temporary ticket price hike, and special early morning benefit shows are planned, promising a grand opening for the action entertainer.

title: 'Forced to join vessel before war': Mumbai engineer killed in tanker attack near Iraq
description: Tragedy struck as Indian seafarer Deonandan Prasad Singh lost his life during an assault on the oil tanker MT Safesea Vishnu near the treacherous Khor Al Zubair Port in Iraq. Reports suggest that Singh's family claims he was compelled to return to the ship merely days prior to the fatal incident, despite being assigned a shore-based position.

title: Iran allows two India‑flagged LPG carriers to transit Strait of Hormuz amid conflict
description: Iran has granted safe passage to two India-flagged LPG carriers through the Strait of Hormuz, a critical energy route. This assurance comes from Iran's Ambassador to India, who emphasized the strong friendship and shared interests between the two nations. The move occurs amidst regional tensions and follows Iran's criticism of US policy on Russian oil imports.

title: Abrar controversy: List of Pak players playing for Indian-owned teams
description: Pakistan spinner Abrar Ahmed’s signing by Sunrisers Leeds in The Hundred created a flutter, though the BCCI said overseas leagues are outside its control. Bought for £190,000 by the Sun Group-owned franchise, Abrar’s deal drew attention as Pakistani players remain absent from the IPL since 2009. Despite that, several Pakistan cricketers have played for IPL-linked teams in global T20 leagues.

title: What really happened to OVW referee Dallas Edwards during chaotic wrestling match?
description: Dallas Edwards, an OVW wrestling referee, suffered a medical emergency after taking a heavy hit during a match in Kentucky. The accident happened when Tony Evans pushed him into Brendan Balling’s top rope move. Edwards hit his head and later showed serious symptoms in the ring. His girlfriend later confirmed on Facebook that doctors are monitoring a brain injury.

title: Why the US is sending assault ship USS Tripoli, thousands of marines to the Middle East
description: The US is significantly expanding its military presence in the Middle East, deploying thousands of Marines and the amphibious assault ship USS Tripoli amid escalating tensions with Iran. This move aims to deter further Iranian aggression, protect vital shipping lanes like the Strait of Hormuz and provide the US with greater response options in the rapidly widening regional conflict.

title: U.S. offers $10 million reward for information on Iran's supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei, senior officials

title: Nikki Bella explains why rumored romance with Eagles rookie Cooper DeJean collapsed
description: Nikki Bella has addressed the rumors linking her to Philadelphia Eagles cornerback Cooper DeJean. Speaking with Lala Kent, the WWE Hall of Famer said the nearly 20-year age gap and heavy online attention made a serious relationship unrealistic. Bella said they spent time together but never dated seriously, and she still believes DeJean is “an incredible guy.”

title: Tanushree Dutta makes shocking claim about exploitation in showbiz: 'Many newcomers get abused...'
description: Tanushree Dutta has once again spoken about the darker side of the entertainment industry, warning aspiring actors about manipulation, exploitation and the dangers of blindly trusting people who promise opportunities. The actress said one of the reasons she speaks openly about such issues is to warn young aspirants who come to the industry chasing dreams.

title: Maha anti-conversion bill proposes 7-year jail, Rs 1 lakh fine
description: Maharashtra has introduced a stringent bill to curb religious conversions through coercion, fraud, or marriage inducement. The proposed law mandates a 60-day notice for conversions and imposes severe penalties, including a seven-year jail term for unlawful conversions linked to marriage. Critics argue the bill infringes on personal freedoms and could foster fear, particularly concerning inter-faith unions.

Restaurants and educational institutions are forced to reduce operations and meals, while families resort to traditional cooking methods to cope with the crisis.

In the 2001 Tamil Nadu Assembly elections, AIADMK supremo Jayalalithaa filed nominations from four seats and

title: 3 workers die of suffocation while cleaning tank at Rajasthan textile factory
description: Three workers tragically died from suffocation after inhaling toxic gas while cleaning a sludge tank at Lalji Wala Mills in Balotra. The workers, identified as Gumanaram, Vishambhar Tiwari, and Shravan, were reportedly sent into the tank without proper safety equipment. An investigation is underway, with preliminary findings suggesting negligence by the factory owner.

title: Palantir CEO Alex Karp admits using Anthropic's Claude after Pentagon ban
description: Palantir CEO Alex Karp confirmed continued use of Anthropic's Claude AI models despite the Pentagon labeling the company a supply chain risk.  The Department of Defense is planning a phase-out, but acknowledges a transition will take time, with potential exemptions for mission-critical operations. This highlights the challenges in disentangling deeply embedded AI systems from defense operations.

title: Taylor Swift’s $2B news signals power future with Travis Kelce
description: Travis Kelce has confirmed he will return to the Kansas City Chiefs for another NFL season, signing a one year deal reportedly worth up to $15 million. The veteran tight end says his decision was driven by his continued love for football. Kelce also credited Taylor Swift’s passion for her craft as inspiration. With the couple expected to marry before training camp, both stars remain committed to thriving in their respective careers rather than slowing down.

title: Fact check: Is Travis Hunter paying $150K monthly to wife Leanna Lenee?
description: Travis Hunter, the Jacksonville Jaguars star player, and his wife, Leanna Lenee, have been married for less than a year and have already found themselves involved in a scandalous debate after rumors of the star player being cheated on by his newly wed wife sparked chaos. Amid this, a clip of Travis Hunter allegedly saying he has to pay her a massive amount monthly to her has sparked chaos.
